lowering_classes.static_pass: Behavior can be flattened entirely through the current jsmx/jsmethod surfaces.
lowering_classes.slow_path_needed: Behavior is valid JS but requires a translator-emitted dynamic slow path outside the current flattened layer.
lowering_classes.unsupported: Behavior is intentionally outside the current project scope.

translation_modes.idiomatic_flattened: The fixture demonstrates the intended flattened lowering into jsmx/jsmethod APIs rather than the literal source structure.
translation_modes.idiomatic_slow_path: The fixture demonstrates the intended translator-emitted slow path outside the flattened jsmx layer.
translation_modes.literal: The fixture intentionally mirrors the upstream source shape more directly than the normal idiomatic translation style.

cases.notes: Translated against the thin jsmethod toWellFormed layer. The original typeof/prototype assertion is intentionally omitted at the library layer.

The reused global regexes are lowered through the explicit JIT constructor, while the one-shot non-global regexes stay on the default constructor.

Direct-lowered: repo-authored parity fixture for parsed JSON-backed versus native RegExp.prototype.exec named-group result objects, including unmatched optional groups. The reused direct-lowered regex is lowered through the explicit JIT constructor.
Rewrite-backed: single literal lone-surrogate `/u` exec/test cases are lowered to explicit UTF-16 surrogate-aware scan helpers so isolated surrogates match while surrogate halves inside pairs do not.

Rewrite-backed: single literal lone-surrogate `/u` search cases are lowered to explicit UTF-16 surrogate-aware scan helpers so the first isolated surrogate index is reported without matching inside surrogate pairs.

Rewrite-backed: single literal lone-surrogate `/u` match cases are lowered to dedicated jsval match helpers so non-global/global String.prototype.match semantics skip surrogate halves inside pairs while still returning isolated surrogates.

Rewrite-backed: single literal lone-surrogate `/u` matchAll cases are lowered to a dedicated jsval iterator helper so exec-shaped iterator results skip surrogate halves inside pairs while still yielding isolated surrogates.

Rewrite-backed: single literal lone-surrogate `/u` matchAll pair-only cases are lowered to the dedicated jsval iterator helper so surrogate halves inside a well-formed pair are never reported as matches.

Rewrite-backed: single literal lone-surrogate `/u` replace and replaceAll cases, including callback replacers, are lowered to dedicated jsval helpers that keep the no-capture contract and skip surrogate halves inside pairs.
Rewrite-backed: single literal lone-surrogate `/u` split cases are lowered to a dedicated jsval split helper so isolated surrogates act as separators without splitting inside surrogate pairs.
Rewrite-backed: fixed multi-literal no-capture `/u` search cases are lowered to a dedicated jsval sequence helper so exact UTF-16 literal matches only land on Unicode code-point boundaries.

Rewrite-backed: fixed multi-literal no-capture `/u` match and matchAll cases are lowered to dedicated jsval sequence helpers so non-global/global results and iterator payloads preserve code-point-boundary matching.

Rewrite-backed: fixed multi-literal no-capture `/u` replace and replaceAll cases, including callback replacers, are lowered to dedicated jsval sequence helpers so substitutions operate only on code-point-boundary-aligned matches.
Rewrite-backed: fixed multi-literal no-capture `/u` split cases are lowered to a dedicated jsval sequence helper so separators only match on Unicode code-point boundaries.
Rewrite-backed: single no-capture `/u` class search cases are lowered to a dedicated jsval class helper so explicit literal members match only at Unicode code-point boundaries.
Rewrite-backed: single no-capture `/u` class match and matchAll cases are lowered to dedicated jsval class helpers so global results and iterator payloads preserve boundary-aware one-unit matches.

Rewrite-backed: single no-capture `/u` class replace and replaceAll cases, including callback replacers, are lowered to dedicated jsval class helpers so substitutions never consume surrogate halves inside pairs.
Rewrite-backed: single no-capture `/u` class split cases are lowered to a dedicated jsval class helper so separators only match isolated literal-member code units.

Rewrite-backed: single negated no-capture `/u` class search cases are lowered to a dedicated jsval negated-class helper so explicit literal-member exclusions still respect Unicode code-point boundaries.

Rewrite-backed: single negated no-capture `/u` class match and matchAll cases are lowered to dedicated jsval negated-class helpers so global results and iterator payloads preserve boundary-aware one-unit exclusions.

Rewrite-backed: single negated no-capture `/u` class replace and replaceAll cases, including callback replacers, are lowered to dedicated jsval negated-class helpers so replacements skip intact surrogate pairs and only consume boundary-aligned exclusions.

Rewrite-backed: single negated no-capture `/u` class split cases are lowered to a dedicated jsval negated-class helper so separators match only isolated boundary-aligned code units outside the explicit literal-member set.
Rewrite-backed: single no-capture `/u` ranged-class search cases are lowered to a dedicated jsval range-class helper so explicit inclusive UTF-16 ranges only match at Unicode code-point boundaries.

Rewrite-backed: single no-capture `/u` ranged-class match and matchAll cases are lowered to dedicated jsval range-class helpers so global results and iterator payloads preserve boundary-aware one-unit matches from explicit inclusive range tables.

Rewrite-backed: single no-capture `/u` ranged-class replace and replaceAll cases, including callback replacers, are lowered to dedicated jsval range-class helpers so replacements never consume surrogate halves inside intact pairs.

Rewrite-backed: single no-capture `/u` ranged-class split cases are lowered to a dedicated jsval range-class helper so separators only match isolated boundary-aligned code units inside the explicit inclusive range table.

Rewrite-backed: single negated no-capture `/u` ranged-class search cases are lowered to a dedicated jsval negated-range-class helper so explicit inclusive exclusion ranges still respect Unicode code-point boundaries.

Rewrite-backed: single negated no-capture `/u` ranged-class match and matchAll cases are lowered to dedicated jsval negated-range-class helpers so global results and iterator payloads preserve boundary-aware one-unit exclusions from explicit inclusive range tables.

Rewrite-backed: single negated no-capture `/u` ranged-class replace and replaceAll cases, including callback replacers, are lowered to dedicated jsval negated-range-class helpers so replacements skip intact surrogate pairs and only consume boundary-aligned exclusions.

Rewrite-backed: single negated no-capture `/u` ranged-class split cases are lowered to a dedicated jsval negated-range-class helper so separators only match isolated boundary-aligned code units outside the explicit inclusive exclusion ranges.

Rewrite-backed: single predefined `/u` digit-class search cases are lowered to dedicated jsval digit and negated-digit helpers so `\d` stays ASCII-only, `\D` remains its boundary-aware complement, and intact surrogate pairs are skipped.

Rewrite-backed: single predefined `/u` word-class match and matchAll cases are lowered to dedicated jsval word and negated-word helpers so `\w` stays ASCII-only, `\W` matches isolated non-word code units, and iterator results keep the no-capture exec shape.

Rewrite-backed: single predefined `/u` whitespace replace and replaceAll cases, including negated callback replacers, are lowered to dedicated jsval whitespace helpers so `\s` uses the JS WhiteSpace plus LineTerminator set and callback `groups` remains undefined.

Rewrite-backed: single predefined `/u` whitespace split cases are lowered to a dedicated jsval whitespace helper so separators follow the JS WhiteSpace plus LineTerminator set while limit handling stays inside the no-capture rewrite lane.
